telemetryFile.description: Path to append per-turn telemetry JSONL (empty = no file logging)

profiles.description: Named tool profiles: { profileName: { tools: [...], keywords: [...] } }

catalogOverridesFile.description: Path to an override catalog JSON file (schema: schemas/catalog.v1.json). Merged on top of the shipped default-catalog.json at boot. Missing file is treated as empty overrides.

toolDescriptionOverrides.description: Inline override map for specific tools (legacy, v0.5.0). Prefer catalogOverridesFile for new deployments. Keys are tool IDs; values are replacement strings. Merged after defaults and before file overrides.

skillDescriptionOverrides.description: Inline override map for specific skills (legacy, v0.5.0). Prefer catalogOverridesFile for new deployments. Keys are skill IDs; values are replacement strings. Merged after defaults and before file overrides.

tags.description: Extra tags appended to LiteLLM-style metadata.tags on every classifier request. Useful for per-deployment cost attribution.
